title: torreyochloa pallida var. pauciflora
intro: Torreyochloa pallida var. pauciflora, also known as slender spike sedge, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Slender spike sedge can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
